title: SLICE-EXTRACT output — candidate vertical slices S* with coverage

aprd_ref.description: Path to frozen aPRD artifact this slicing is derived from.

lock_verified.description: Lock file present and names the frozen artifact; verified before slicing begins.

project.description: Verbatim PROJECT line from the frozen aPRD.

slices.description: Candidate vertical slices in emission order (lowest contributing R* index). Not priority order.

id.description: Stable S* identifier, contiguous from S1, in emission order.

name.description: One-line demoable user-visible capability (verb client recognises; never a layer name).

requirements.description: Non-empty list of R* IDs verbatim from frozen aPRD that this slice needs to run end-to-end.

acceptance.description: Non-empty list of AC* IDs verbatim from frozen aPRD; at least one must be black-box/user-observable.

value.description: Provisional client-owned value tier: high, med, or low.

value_basis.description: Why this value tier — centrality to PROJECT statement; proposed here, confirmed at SEQUENCE-REVIEW.

retires_risk.description: Concrete named unproven decision/integration this slice first exercises, or null if none.

depends_on.description: S* IDs of coarse slice-level prerequisites from aPRD; may be empty; must be acyclic.

unsliceable.description: R*/behaviours that could not be placed into any demoable vertical slice; empty on full coverage.

ref.description: R* or other aPRD ID that cannot be sliced.

reason.description: Why no demoable vertical slice can carry this requirement.

coverage.description: Full coverage accounting — requirement_orphans and acceptance_orphans both empty on clean run.

requirements_total.description: Every R* ID in the frozen aPRD.

requirements_covered.description: R* IDs that appear in at least one slice's requirements list.

requirement_orphans.description: R* IDs in requirements_total not covered by any slice; empty on clean run.

acceptance_total.description: Every AC* ID in the frozen aPRD.

acceptance_covered.description: AC* IDs that appear in at least one slice's acceptance list.

acceptance_orphans.description: AC* IDs in acceptance_total not covered by any slice; empty on clean run.

slice_counts.description: Summary counts; total must equal slices.length.

baseline_completed_slices.description: Feature-add only: pinned baseline completed slices from 08-rerank.json for reference and depends_on legality. Never appear in slices[].
